data.title: Vitalik Buterin Transfers 90 ETH to New Address
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain monitoring platform Arkham reported that five hours ago, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin transferred 90 ETH, approximately valued at $200,000, to the address '0x0BE724A47f5b44E8068F0c4e899c1C8565bb8eb7.'

data.title: BNB Surpasses 610 USDT with a 2.59% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 02, 2025, 09:45 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 610 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 610.390015 USDT, with a narrowed 2.59% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: BETA rose above 0.025 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 27%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitget market data shows that BETA (Beta Finance) rose above 0.025 USDT and is currently trading at 0.02839 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 27%.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-03-02)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $2.82T, up by 5.83% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $84,334 and $86,590 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $85,881, up by 0.48%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include RED, BETA, and AMP, up by 50%, 30%, and 9%, respectively.

data.title: Vitalik's address transferred 90 ETH to an address 5 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Arkham monitoring, Vitalik Buterin's address transferred 90 ETH, equivalent to approximately US$200,000, to the "0x0BE724A47f5b44E8068F0c4e899c1C8565bb8eb7" address 5 hours ago.

data.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg has a pet goat named 'Bitcoin'
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cointelegraph published an article on the X platform stating that Meta CEO Zuckerberg has a pet goat named "Bitcoin". According to relevant information, Zuckerberg posted a photo of his pet goat on May 10, 2021 and captioned: "My goats: Max and Bitcoin".

data.title:
With $BTC at ~$80K, the upside potential will be more attractive to sidelined capital again.

e.g. the $150K level is something that has been discussed a lot. That's almost a 100% gain from this point.

Compared to a ~50% move just a week earlier.

Risk/Reward will start making…
Japan Finance Minister: 110% tax on crypto assets is possible, but not limited to crypto assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Japanese Finance Minister KATO Katsunobu mentioned the possibility of imposing a 110% tax rate on crypto assets at a meeting of the House of Representatives Budget Committee (inheritance tax + income tax + resident tax = 110%). He said that this situation may exist under current laws and is "not limited to crypto assets". The tax rate "only applies to extremely high profits." (Cryptopolitan)

data.title: CZ: Consider supporting some projects that adopt new token models
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CZ added to the new token economic model conceived before: "Some projects may try this new token economic model, and we may even support some of them (not all). Just because this token model is adopted does not mean that we will automatically provide support. A new token economic model cannot solve all problems. Any model can be manipulated, people can sell the first 10% of the shares, and the project may fail at any stage. For a project to succeed, it still needs: products, community, income, etc. Most importantly, we need founders who are mission-driven and trustworthy. The new token economic model conceived before has some advantages (or at least differences) over the fixed-time unlocking currently on the market. Let's see what happens."

data.title: Data: Over 13,000 BTC flowed out of Coinbase Pro exchange wallet in the past 7 days
data.description: The latest data from Coinglass shows that 13,383.09 bitcoins have flowed out of the Coinbase Pro exchange in the past week, 9,402.96 bitcoins have flowed into the Binance wallet in the past 7 days, and 6,681.80 bitcoins have flowed into the Bitfinex wallet in the past 7 days.
